evals.prompt: Docusaurus 博客的 truncate 语法是什么？
evals.expected_output: Answer explains the truncate syntax for .md and .mdx files, and cites the official Docusaurus blog docs URL.
expectations: Mentions the `<!-- truncate -->` syntax for Markdown files
Mentions the `{/* truncate */}` syntax for MDX files
Cites the official Docusaurus blog URL (https://docusaurus.io/docs/blog)

evals.prompt: Docusaurus 里怎么配置代码块高亮的额外语言？
evals.expected_output: Answer mentions themeConfig.prism.additionalLanguages and provides a config example, citing the official code blocks docs URL.
expectations: Cites the official code blocks URL (https://docusaurus.io/docs/markdown-features/code-blocks)

evals.prompt: 我想把 Docusaurus 站点部署到 GitHub Pages，需要配置哪些字段？
evals.expected_output: Answer lists required docusaurus.config.js fields like url, baseUrl, organizationName, projectName, deploymentBranch, and cites the official deployment docs URL.
